name: Sustained
short_description: This is a open world Survival Zombie game with survival mechanics in single player and (PVP) (PVE) in Multiplayer or Co-Op. Join a few friends and look who can survive the island full of zombies and other players trying to survive like you, it has base building, Crafting, food, water, Temperatures.
detailed_description:
The Story starts after a covid outbreak where a new strain of the virus causes people to turn into the undead.
Only a few people have survived and are trying to Sustain a place to stay and survive the winter and cold nights with zombies and Robots taking over what use to belong to them. Stranded on a island trying to survive looking for food, water and medical.
Make sure to follow your objectives and get yourself a place to stay ASAP so that you can survive the cold Dark nights.

There will be updates every week with new content and bug fixes

Sustained will be in early access for 3 - 4 years as I am a solo Developer trying my best to give you the best experience in the game that I can offer. I do have a few social media links where you can come to give me feedback to improve the game where I can.
So have fun and learn to know your character's abilities as it might give you that win streak.
